mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, receipt_no, purchase_order_id, warehouse_id, receipt_status, failure_reason, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM purchase_receipt WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, receipt_no, purchase_order_id, warehouse_id, receipt_status, failure_reason, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM purchase_receipt WHERE receipt_no = #{receiptNo} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id, receipt_no, purchase_order_id, warehouse_id, receipt_status, failure_reason, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted FROM purchase_receipt WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
